what_it_does: Acts as a ledger record for an image asset in the design-source channel; it stores YAML frontmatter metadata (id, address, channel, path, blob reference, MIME type, name, dimensions, source label, author session, creation time, links) and a one-line body caption declaring the file as SOURCE design ground-truth.

The asset is referenced by a blob URI blob://b2:a7ec5675f3de2511ec7b3c36c1b911da.
MIME type is image/jpeg and the file name is p-44.
Body text reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-44.jpg'.
author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r and created timestamp is 2026-06-22T11:31:03.054954+00:00.
standouts: Zero recorded width/height for an image asset.
Empty links array with no related references.
Blob reference uses a b2-prefixed scheme.
conventions: Follows a YAML-frontmatter ledger schema for channel-memory image entries.
Uses channel/path/blob/mime/created/author_session fields typical of asset catalog records.
Breaks completeness expectation by leaving image dimensions as 0.
concerns: w and h are 0, suggesting missing or failed image metadata extraction.
links is empty, so no explicit relationships to pitches or other assets are recorded.
No alt text, caption, or content description of the image itself.
Author is only an opaque session id with no human-readable name.
notes: A sparse metadata stub for a design-source pitch image, notable mainly for its missing dimensions and empty link set.
questions: Why are the image width and height zero?
What visual content or pitch does p-44 depict?
Why are there no links to related pitches, designs, or documents?

purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record a SOURCE design ground-truth image; the file does that as a metadata ledger entry, but the zero dimensions and empty links mean it is an incomplete asset record.
intention_signals: It appears intended to register a specific recent-pitches image as authoritative design-source material so it can be located, attributed, and referenced by downstream tooling.
novelty: The blob://b2-prefixed storage reference and the explicit 'SOURCE design ground-truth' caption are unusual in an otherwise minimal record.
contribution: It contributes a stable, addressable metadata record that maps a design-source image path to a blob identifier, author session, and creation timestamp, which a fused system can use to locate and attribute the asset.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter ledger entry for a JPEG image named p-44 in the design-source/recent-pitches channel, referencing blob b2:a7ec5675f3de2511ec7b3c36c1b911da, with zero recorded dimensions, authored in session ch-3mpkjg3r on 2026-06-22, and labeled as SOURCE design ground-truth.
intention_for_embedding: It was meant to catalog and ground-truth a recent pitch image asset in the design-source channel.
